_README: CPF LOGISTICS WEATHER DATA FILE. Edit this file to update the dashboard. PAGASA is the ONLY source of truth. Leave a field as empty string or empty array if PAGASA has not specified it — the dashboard will display 'Not specified in latest PAGASA bulletin'. Do NOT invent values. Set situation.mode to one of: typhoon | tropical_depression | advisory | clear. The dashboard title, headline banner, operational status and colors are derived automatically from this data unless you override them under cpf.*.

rainfall.outlook: 100–200 mm within 24 hours over Bicol Region, Quezon, and the eastern portion of Central Luzon; 50–100 mm over the rest of Southern Luzon.

thunderstorm.advisory: Moderate to heavy rains with lightning and strong winds expected over Metro Manila, Rizal, Laguna, and Cavite within the next 2 hours.

marine.hazards: Rough to very rough seas (2.8 to 4.5 m) over the eastern and northern seaboards of Luzon. Sea travel is risky for all types of vessels; RORO and small craft should not venture out over affected waters.

forecast.synopsis: Typhoon INDAY and the Southwest Monsoon (Habagat) will bring rains and gusty winds over Luzon and the western sections of Visayas. Flooding and rain-induced landslides are possible in areas with heavy or prolonged rainfall.

regions.impact: Flooding possible in low-lying and poorly drained areas

cpf.executive_summary: Typhoon INDAY is tracking WNW toward eastern Luzon with TCWS #2 over Bicol. Habagat is enhancing rains over Southern Luzon and Western Visayas. Bicol and Quezon corridors face flood and wind risk; western seaboards face marine risk affecting RORO. Central Luzon feedmill operations remain workable under monitoring.

priority_routes.note: Flood-prone at Camarines Sur; TCWS #2 in effect
Heavy rain; validate underpasses and low bridges
Gale warning; confirm port and RORO status

cpf.contractor_advisory: To all hauling partners: Trips to Bicol are on HOLD until TCWS is lowered and passability is confirmed. RORO trips via Batangas–Mindoro are SUSPENDED under the gale warning — do not proceed until PAGASA lifts the warning and the port confirms sailing. For Southern Luzon trips, validate route passability and receiving-site readiness before releasing. Report driver location and any road closures to Logistics Control immediately.
cpf.affected_deliveries_note: Notify receiving sites in TCWS #2 areas (Catanduanes, Camarines Sur/Norte, Albay) of expected delays. Reconfirm delivery windows for Bicol and Mindoro-bound loads once signals are lowered. Hold cold-chain (reefer) trips to affected corridors to protect load integrity.

change_log.entry: SWB #12 ingested. Bicol corridors elevated to Dispatch Hold; Batangas–Mindoro RORO set to Suspension per gale warning.
TCWS #2 raised over Bicol. Naga/Bicol hub status changed to Dispatch Hold.
Heightened monitoring activated for Southern Luzon corridors ahead of INDAY approach.
